name: Transparency and Accountability
description: Being open and honest in communications, and taking responsibility for actions and decisions. This tactic is essential in building trust with stakeholders, particularly in times of crisis.
when_to_apply: in response to a data breach or other crisis, to demonstrate a commitment to transparency and accountability
example: notifying affected customers immediately and providing regular updates on the situation
anti_pattern: delaying notification or providing misleading information

name: Incident Response Protocol
description: A planned and rehearsed response to a crisis, including procedures for containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident activities. This tactic is essential in minimizing damage and disruption.
when_to_apply: in response to a cyber attack or other crisis, to minimize damage and disruption
example: isolating affected systems and initiating incident response protocol
anti_pattern: trying to remove malware and restore systems to normal operation without isolating affected systems
